form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Last start 3rd of 10 at this track on March 22 over 1400m, slow going 3 len behind Beyond All Doubt with 58.5kg at $2.80. The race before that 2nd of 8 at Scottsville on February 18 over 1600m, head behind Red Cardinal with 60kg at $7. Leading contender coming out of a very nice draw.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1.5). Form hard to fault. Last start 3rd of 10 at this track on March 22 over 1400m, slow going 3 len behind Beyond All Doubt with 58.5kg at $2.80. The race before that 2nd of 8 at Scottsville on February 18 over 1600m, head behind Red Cardinal with 60kg at $7. Leading contender coming out of a very nice draw.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Leaving the starting stalls, came together and bumped with Taste The Rainbow.
Shortly after the start, bumped Princess Trippi and was bumped by Best Of All.

form.formComment: At the latest run 5th of 8 at this track on March 29 over 1900m, 3 len behind No Pressure carrying 60kg at $4.30. The start before that 5th of 7 at Greyville All Weather on February 27 over 1800m, 7 len behind Wander Skitt with 60.5kg at $1.80. Draws well and is a strong winning chance.

form.formComment: First-starter by Twice Over out of Darkness Bright. Maybe later.

formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First-starter by Twice Over out of Darkness Bright. Maybe later.

form.formComment: At debut, 7th of 10 at Greyville All Weather on March 27 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Higher Love with 60.5kg at $8. Expecting a bit more with the race experience on board.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(6). At debut, 7th of 10 at Greyville All Weather on March 27 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Higher Love with 60.5kg at $8. Expecting a bit more with the race experience on board.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Comes off a 52 day let-up. At the latest run 4th of 8 at Scottsville on February 18 over 1600m, 3 len behind Red Cardinal carrying 60kg at $6.50. The race before that 3rd of 9 at this track on January 18 over 1600m, 1.5 len behind Deepest Water carrying 59kg at $4. Capable of a strong showing.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Racing well recently. Comes off a 52 day let-up. At the latest run 4th of 8 at Scottsville on February 18 over 1600m, 3 len behind Red Cardinal carrying 60kg at $6.50. The race before that 3rd of 9 at this track on January 18 over 1600m, 1.5 len behind Deepest Water carrying 59kg at $4. Capable of a strong showing.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the 200m, came together and brushed with Flag Champ.
Rolled in shortly after entering the straight, carrying in Turbo Tiger.
Switched to the outside of Green Gateway at the 250m to continue its run.

form.formComment: First-starter by The Apache out of The Centenary. Sure to be better for this run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First-starter by The Apache out of The Centenary. Sure to be better for this run.

form.formComment: At the latest run 5th of 8 at Greyville All Weather on March 27 over 1600m, 10 len behind Irish Anthem carrying 61.5kg at $2.80. Before that 2nd of 7 at Greyville All Weather on March 8 over 1600m, 0.6 len behind I Am Invictus with 60kg at $7. Should go well.

Before that 2nd of 7 at Greyville All Weather on March 8 over 1600m, 0.6 len behind I Am Invictus with 60kg at $7. Should go well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Commenced to hang in from the 500m.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign second last of 11 at Greyville All Weather on February 6 over 1600m, 26 len behind Takeyourbestshot carrying 60.5kg at $101. When resuming last campaign 4th in a small field at Greyville All Weather on November 18 over 1400m, 15 len behind Greatest Hit with 54kg at $17. Happy to work around.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months 3rd of 8 at this track on March 29 over 1900m, 2.25 len behind No Pressure with 60kg at $6. Previously second-up 5th of 10 at Greyville All Weather on October 22 over 1600m, 4.5 len behind Green Mile with 58kg at $101. Improver with winning prospects.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Third-up today. Freshened for 38 days. Resuming 4th of 11 at Kenilworth on February 22 over 1400m, 2 len behind Greenchoice carrying 60kg at $101. Second-up 4th in a small field at Durbanville on March 4 over 1600m, 4.5 len behind Fort Yukon with 60kg at $6. Racing well and ready to win. Top prospects.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Jumped slow, losing one length and thereafter was slow into stride.
Jumped slow, losing one length. Raced green.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Returns from a 43-day let-up. At the latest run 3rd in a small field at Greyville All Weather on February 27 over 1800m, 2 len behind Many Waters carrying 61.5kg at $2.80. The start before that 2nd of 11 at Greyville All Weather on February 6 over 1600m, 1.75 len behind Takeyourbestshot carrying 56.0kg at $3. Sure to be about the money.
